Off Calendar Jun-23-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR For Filing Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jun-09-2025 Continued To Jun-23-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR For Filing Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Feb-03-2025 Continued To Jun-09-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Franchesca Callejo appeared via zoom for and with Lise McCarthy (Administrator).

Discussion was held regarding the two heirs that are the daughters, my daughter lives in Canada and the other daughter has special needs and lives in Nicaragua, that expenses are over $1500.00 a month for the daughter who resides in Nicaragua, and that they have a great aunt who is 80 years old that lives in the U.S. The sister in Canada has been supporting the sister in Nicaragua as of 2020, Ms. Callejo stated that there is no creditors claim filed and seeks a waiver on accounting. This matter is continued to June 09, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-20-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate.
Off Calendar Oct-23-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate.
Off Calendar Jul-03-2024 Continued To Oct-23-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Franchesca Callejo appeared by zoom for and with Lise McCarthy (administrator) by zoom.

Mrs. Callejo provided an oral status report and requested a one-year extension for administration of the estate. Status on close of estate is continued to October 23, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mrs. Callejo is to file a petition for approval of report on status of administration by October 2, 2024.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Lopes. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate.
Off Calendar May-06-2024 Continued To Jul-03-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-10-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Franchesca Callejo appearing via zoom for and with (petitioner) Lise McCarthy, appearing via zoom.

Charles Jonas appearing via zoom (Proposed guardian ad litem).

The Court queries the estimated bond set at $250,000 and why predeceased brother's estate seem to have $400,000 and suggests increasing bond to $275,000. The Court and Mrs. Callejo discuss the issues presented to her via the examiner's notes and the guardian ad litem issue. Mrs. Callejo reports that she has waivers of conflict and doesn't believe that there's a conflict of interest. After additional discussion the Court appreciates the parties' efforts regarding guardian ad litem issue. The Court advises that it is granting the Petition for Letters of Administration, appointing Lise McCarthy as the Administrator of the estate with full authority, Bond is set at $275,000., Status on close of estate is set for May 06, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204, Michael Kasolas is appointed Probate Referee. Order signed in open Court. The Court and parties discussed the pending ex-parte application for an order appointing guardian ad litem. The Court advised that it will look for the ex parte application which it intends to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-13-2023 Continued To Apr-10-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
